notes: Fix 1 (H001): phases.json renames p2-polling→p2-retry (target_range 103-114) and p3-display→p3-poll (target_range 116-145); p3-spot-1 prompt contains {{ poll_interval_ms }}; both phases have rungs blocks, doc_links, verification, and explainer_md. Fix 1 follow-on: 8 new content files for p2/p3 rungs and phase explainers. Fix 2 (H002): outputStyle.ts both bare {ok:false} branches now return {ok:false,warning:{kind:'output-style-plugin-not-enabled',...}}; warnings.ts adds OutputStylePluginNotEnabledWarning type. Fix 3 (H003): state.ts dedup-archives identical corrupt bytes via findExistingArchive scan; selectPath.ts treats corrupt+archivedTo as absent and mints fresh state. Fix 4 (H004): runPreflightProbe.ts accepts probeOpts:Partial<Record<ProbeId,ProbeOptions>> and threads it through runDeployRemediation. Fix 5 (H005): scenarios.json E-008 gets 5th precondition 'Sui CLI in 1.63.2–1.64.1'; scripts/cycle-e2e-pass.sh created (executable) with skip-with-reason logic for E-008 when sui-cli is out of range. Fix 6 (H001 ladder reachability): automatic via phase rename.
